name: Python Bytecode Decompiler
description: Decompile Python bytecode (.pyc / compiled code objects) back to source with decompyle3. Best for CPython 3.7-3.8 bytecode (e.g. PyInstaller-extracted payloads); reports honestly when the bytecode version is out of range. Static: reads bytecode, never runs it.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install Python 3.8+ to run the decompiler. The target .pyc can be a different version; decompyle3 targets 3.7-3.8 bytecode.

safety.notes: Static analysis: unmarshals the code object and reconstructs source from disassembled bytecode. Never imports, execs, or runs the .pyc.

payload.note: Vendored via `uv pip install --target runtime/site` (pure-Python → portable across OS/arch, unlike webcrack's native addon). decompyle3 targets CPython 3.7-3.8 bytecode; older bytecode uses uncompyle6, 3.9+ needs a version-matched decompiler — the runner reports the detected version and whether it's in range.
